topbar.right: WPA Card • Membership • Access • Verification • Future benefits
brand.title: World Protocol Academy
brand.subtitle: World Protocol Academy — WPA
hero.title: We do not lock knowledge. We build a premium layer around it.
hero.text: The WPA Card is the future membership, access and verification layer of the World Protocol Academy.
hero.note: Strategic principle: open content to build authority + a premium membership layer on top.
access.label: Access strategy
access.title: Open authority + premium upgrade.
access.text: WPA should not look like a closed website. It should look like an open authority with a premium upgrade layer.
access.card1.title: Books and papers as public trust
access.card1.text: Publications and scientific papers build the academic weight and public trust of the institution.
access.card2.title: The WPA Card adds value
access.card2.text: The WPA Card is not a hard paywall. It is an upgrade: membership status, access and recognition.
access.card3.title: Ready for QR and certificates
access.card3.text: The future system can connect membership, certificates and programmes through verification.
tiers.label: WPA Card tiers
tiers.title: Four practical membership tiers for growth.
tiers.text: These tiers are set out as an institutional model. Prices and conditions are indicative and pre-launch.
tiers.free.text: Basic public access to open pages, publications, papers and core resources.
tiers.pro.text: For professionals, students and users who want a structured learning and membership layer.
tiers.academic.text: For teachers, researchers, libraries, students and academic partners.
tiers.institutional.text: For institutions, organisations, teams, embassies and training centres.
notice.title: Important legal and institutional notice
notice.p1: The WPA Card is a concept for a membership, access and verification layer that is in pre-launch preparation.
notice.p2: The value of the WPA Card derives from a clear programme, membership structure and institutional recognition.
cta.title: Next move: a CTA layer for the books and papers.
cta.text: Open publications build trust. The WPA Card turns that trust into structured membership.
footer.title: World Protocol Academy
footer.text: Independent digital academy and professional platform focused on protocol, diplomacy, public communication and security studies.
meta.title: WPA Card | World Protocol Academy
meta.description: The WPA Card is the membership, access and verification layer of the World Protocol Academy.
meta.ogdesc: Open content, a premium upgrade and institutional value.
